fault_hypothesis: On line 58, the mean is computed by dividing by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the window is larger than the available data, `tail` has fewer elements than `window`, so dividing by `window` produces a value that is too small.

constraints.intent: The mean must be total divided by the actual number of tail elements, not by window.
After computing mean, verify it equals total divided by actual sample count.
Before returning mean, confirm it was computed using len(tail) not window.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - round(sum(values[-window:]) / len(values[-window:]), 2)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: The returned value should match the mean of actual tail elements, not window-divided mean.
